blended.narrative: Big White is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,384 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
